items.author: Mike Finger
items.body_excerpt:
People have been using playoff losses to craft kneejerk narratives about star players since long before social media. Or the internet.

I’m old enough — really, I am! — to remember when Michael Jordan was a great scorer who couldn’t win when it counted.
